content.question: What is the quantitative relationship between specialist teacher/support staff capacity and the ability to serve identified SEN students at different school scales and rural/urban locations?
content.reduction_path: Audit current specialist staffing levels (speech therapists, psychologists, sign language interpreters, etc.) by school type and region; establish minimum-adequacy thresholds from international comparisons; project forward under demographic scenarios to identify where capacity-demand gaps will emerge and when
